chunks.text:
# Enterprise ERP Business Glossary

## Sales & Customer Management

### Customer
**Definition**: An individual or organization that purchases goods or services from the company. Customers can be classified as retail (B2C) or business (B2B) with different credit terms and pricing structures.

**Attributes**: customer_id, customer_name, customer_type, credit_limit, payment_terms, tax_id, registration_date, status

**Related Concepts**: Sales Order, Invoice, Payment, Customer Address, Credit Score
... [TRUNCATED]

## Inventory & Warehousing

### Warehouse
**Definition**: A physical location where inventory is stored. Warehouses can be company-owned, third-party logistics (3PL) facilities, or virtual locations for transit inventory.

**Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status

**Related Concepts**: Inventory Transaction, Bin Location, Warehouse Zone, Stock Transfer

### Inventory Transaction
**Definition**: A record of any movem... [TRUNCATED]

## Human Resources

### Employee
**Definition**: An individual who works for the company under an employment contract. Employees can be full-time, part-time, contract, or temporary with different compensation and benefit structures.

**Attributes**: employee_id, first_name, last_name, employee_type, department_id, position_id, hire_date, status, salary, manager_id

**Related Concepts**: Department, Position, Employee Compensation, Time Entry, Performance Review

### Department
**Definition**: An... [TRUNCATED]

## Quality & Compliance

### Quality Inspection
**Definition**: A systematic examination of materials or products to verify conformance to specifications. Inspections can be incoming (from suppliers), in-process (during production), or final (before shipping).

**Attributes**: inspection_id, inspection_type, reference_type, reference_id, product_id, inspection_date, inspector_id, result, defects_found, status

**Related Concepts**: Product, Supplier, Purchase Receipt, Work Order, Quality Standar... [TRUNCATED]

## Reporting & Analytics

### Key Performance Indicator (KPI)
**Definition**: A quantifiable metric used to evaluate performance against strategic objectives. KPIs can be financial, operational, customer-facing, or employee-related.

**Common KPIs**: Order fulfillment rate, Inventory turnover, Supplier on-time delivery, Customer satisfaction, Employee productivity, Production yield

### Financial Statement
**Definition**: Formal reports summarizing financial performance and position. Primary sta... [TRUNCATED]

entities_post_resolution.name: Accounts Receivable
entities_post_resolution.definition: Accounts Payable is money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit, with aging and payment workflows to manage payment due dates.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Accounts Receivable
**Definition**: Money owed to the company by customers for goods or services delivered on credit. AR aging tracks overdue payments and supports collections workflows. | **Attributes**: ar_id, customer_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, days_overdue, status, collection_status, last_contact_date | ### Accounts Payable
**Definition**: Money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit. AP aging tracks payment due dates and supports payment approval workflows. | **Attributes**: ap_id, supplier_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, discount_available, discount_until, status, payment_priority

entities_post_resolution.name: Money Owed
entities_post_resolution.definition: Amounts of money due in credit transactions between the company and its trading partners, encompassing both accounts receivable and accounts payable.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Accounts Receivable
**Definition**: Money owed to the company by customers for goods or services delivered on credit. AR aging tracks overdue payments and supports collections workflows. | ### Accounts Payable
**Definition**: Money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit. AP aging tracks payment due dates and supports payment approval workflows.

entities_post_resolution.name: Position Title
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique identifier for a job position (role) in the organization's human resources data model, typically used with attributes such as position_title, job_family, grade_level, min_salary, max_salary, department_id, status, and required_qualifications.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Attributes: position_id, position_title, job_family, grade_level, min_salary, max_salary, department_id, status, required_qualifications | **Attributes**: bin_id, warehouse_id, zone_id, aisle, shelf, position, capacity_quantity, current_quantity, product_id

entities_post_resolution.name: Purchase Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A commercial document issued by a buyer to a seller indicating types, quantities, and agreed prices for products or services, typically going through approval workflows before being sent to suppliers.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: po_id, supplier_id, order_date, required_date, total_amount, status, approved_by, approval_date, warehouse_id | **Definition**: A commercial document issued by a buyer to a seller indicating types, quantities, and agreed prices for products or services. Purchase orders go through approval workflows before being sent to suppliers. | **Attributes**: order_id, customer_id, order_date, delivery_date, total_amount, status, sales_rep_id, warehouse_id | **Definition**: A commercial document issued by a seller to a buyer indicating types, quantities, and agreed prices for products or services. Sales orders can be in draft, confirmed, shipped, or cancelled status.

entities_post_resolution.name: General Ledger Account
entities_post_resolution.definition: A General Ledger Account is a financial record for a specific account type, organized within a chart of accounts with hierarchies for the balance sheet and income statement, identified by account_id, account_number, and account_name.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### General Ledger Account
**Definition**: A chronological record of all financial transactions for a specific account type. Accounts are organized into a chart of accounts with hierarchies for balance sheet and income statement. | **Attributes**: account_id, account_number, account_name, account_type, parent_account_id, currency, balance_type, status | **Attributes**: budget_id, budget_type, period_id, department_id, account_id, budgeted_amount, actual_amount, variance, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipping Carrier
entities_post_resolution.definition: A logistics carrier (shipping provider) entity representing a transport service used for shipments, identified by a unique carrier_id and characterized by attributes such as carrier_name and carrier_type.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: shipment_id, shipment_type, origin_location_id, destination_location_id, ship_date, estimated_arrival, carrier_id, tracking_number, status | **Attributes**: carrier_id, carrier_name, carrier_type, service_level, contact_phone, email, rating, status | **Attributes**: route_id, route_name, origin_id, destination_id, distance_km, estimated_hours, carrier_id, service_level, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Department
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Department is an organizational unit identified by a unique department_id and described by department_name, with optional hierarchical, managerial, location, status, and budgeting attributes.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Attributes: department_id, department_name, parent_department_id, manager_id, budget_code, location, status | **Attributes**: budget_id, budget_type, period_id, department_id, account_id, budgeted_amount, actual_amount, variance, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Destination Location Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The destination location ID used in shipment records to identify the final destination location for a given shipment.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: shipment_id, shipment_type, origin_location_id, destination_location_id, ship_date, estimated_arrival, carrier_id, tracking_number, status | **Attributes**: route_id, route_name, origin_id, destination_id, distance_km, estimated_hours, carrier_id, service_level, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Time Entry Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique identifier for a time-tracking record that captures an employee's work on a project, including work date, hours worked, work type, description, and approval status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Attributes: time_entry_id, employee_id, project_id, work_date, hours_worked, work_type, description, approval_status, submitted_date | **Attributes**: entry_id, entry_date, period_id, source_document_type, source_document_id, created_by, approved_by, status, total_debit, total_credit

entities_post_resolution.name: Warehouse
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Warehouse is a storage facility identified by warehouse_id and warehouse_name, with attributes such as type, location, capacity, and management, and is referenced in transfer records as the origin (from_warehouse_id) or destination (to_warehouse_id).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Warehouse
**Definition**: A physical location where inventory is stored. Warehouses can be company-owned, third-party logistics (3PL) facilities, or virtual locations for transit inventory. | **Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status | **Attributes**: transfer_id, from_warehouse_id, to_warehouse_id, transfer_date, status, shipment_method, tracking_number | **Attributes**: transaction_id, product_id, warehouse_id, transaction_type, quantity, transaction_date, reference_type, reference_id, unit_cost | **Attributes**: bin_id, warehouse_id, zone_id, aisle, shelf, position, capacity_quantity, current_quantity, product_id

entities_post_resolution.name: Inspection Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique identifier for a specific inspection event/record, used to link related attributes such as inspector, product, date, and result.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: inspection_id, inspection_type, reference_type, reference_id, product_id, inspection_date, inspector_id, result, defects_found, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Project Manager Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unique identifier for the individual assigned as the project manager for a given project.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: project_id, project_name, project_type, customer_id, project_manager_id, start_date, end_date, budget_amount, status, priority | **Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status | **Attributes**: task_id, project_id, task_name, parent_task_id, assigned_to, start_date, due_date, estimated_hours, actual_hours, status, completion_percentage

entities_post_resolution.name: Origin Location Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: An identifier for the origin location in transportation data used to indicate where a shipment or route originates.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: shipment_id, shipment_type, origin_location_id, destination_location_id, ship_date, estimated_arrival, carrier_id, tracking_number, status | **Attributes**: route_id, route_name, origin_id, destination_id, distance_km, estimated_hours, carrier_id, service_level, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Route
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Route represents a transportation path between an origin and a destination used by carriers to move goods or passengers, identified by a unique route_id and optionally labeled by route_name, and characterized by distance, estimated travel time, carrier, service level, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: route_id, route_name, origin_id, destination_id, distance_km, estimated_hours, carrier_id, service_level, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment Method
entities_post_resolution.definition: A shipment entity representing a shipment with a designated type, including origin and destination locations, ship date, estimated arrival, carrier, tracking number, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: transfer_id, from_warehouse_id, to_warehouse_id, transfer_date, status, shipment_method, tracking_number | **Attributes**: shipment_id, shipment_type, origin_location_id, destination_location_id, ship_date, estimated_arrival, carrier_id, tracking_number, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Cash Flow Statement
entities_post_resolution.definition: A financial statement that reports a company's revenues, expenses, and net income for a specific period.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Types: Balance Sheet (assets, liabilities, equity), Income Statement (revenue, expenses, profit), Cash Flow Statement (operating, investing, financing activities)

entities_post_resolution.name: Movement Of Inventory
entities_post_resolution.definition: The movement of inventory between warehouses or locations, including stock transfers that can be planned or ad-hoc (emergency replenishment).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Stock Transfer
**Definition**: The movement of inventory between warehouses or locations. Stock transfers can be planned (inter-warehouse transfers) or ad-hoc (emergency replenishment). | Common KPIs: Order fulfillment rate, Inventory turnover, Supplier on-time delivery, Customer satisfaction, Employee productivity, Production yield

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Fulfillment Rate
entities_post_resolution.definition: The percentage value indicating how much of a task or project work has been completed, used to monitor progress in task management systems.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Common KPIs: Order fulfillment rate, Inventory turnover, Supplier on-time delivery, Customer satisfaction, Employee productivity, Production yield | **Attributes**: task_id, project_id, task_name, parent_task_id, assigned_to, start_date, due_date, estimated_hours, actual_hours, status, completion_percentage

entities_post_resolution.name: Supplier Contract
entities_post_resolution.definition: Supplier Contract: A formal agreement between the company and a supplier that defines terms, conditions, pricing, and service level agreements (SLAs); contracts can be fixed-price, cost-plus, or rate-based.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: A formal agreement between the company and a supplier defining terms, conditions, pricing, and service level agreements (SLAs). Contracts can be fixed-price, cost-plus, or rate-based. | **Definition**: An external entity that provides goods or services to the company. Suppliers are evaluated on quality, delivery performance, and cost. Each supplier has a credit rating and payment terms.

entities_post_resolution.name: Collection Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: Collection_status denotes the current state of a debt-collection item or account within the collections workflow, including its stage and last contact date.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: ar_id, customer_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, days_overdue, status, collection_status, last_contact_date | **Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status | **Attributes**: transfer_id, from_warehouse_id, to_warehouse_id, transfer_date, status, shipment_method, tracking_number | **Attributes**: entry_id, entry_date, period_id, source_document_type, source_document_id, created_by, approved_by, status, total_debit, total_credit | **Attributes**: ap_id, supplier_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, discount_available, discount_until, status, payment_priority | **Attributes**: budget_id, budget_type, period_id, department_id, account_id, budgeted_amount, actual_amount, variance, status | **Attributes**: inspection_id, inspection_type, reference_type, reference_id, product_id, inspection_date, inspector_id, result, defects_found, status | **Attributes**: standard_id, standard_code, standard_na

entities_post_resolution.name: Reported By
entities_post_resolution.definition: The user or identifier of the entity that created a given record entry in the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: ncr_id, ncr_type, reference_type, reference_id, product_id, issue_date, reported_by, severity, root_cause, status, resolution_date | **Attributes**: entry_id, entry_date, period_id, source_document_type, source_document_id, created_by, approved_by, status, total_debit, total_credit

entities_post_resolution.name: Discount Available
entities_post_resolution.definition: discount_until is the date by which a supplier invoice discount can be taken, i.e., the deadline for availing a cash discount.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: ap_id, supplier_id, invoice_id, amount_due, due_date, discount_available, discount_until, status, payment_priority

entities_post_resolution.name: Non Conformance Report (Ncr)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Non-Conformance Report (NCR) is a quality-management record that documents a deviation from specified requirements, identified by ncr_id and categorized by ncr_type, with related metadata such as reference_type, reference_id, product_id, issue_date, reported_by, severity, root_cause, status, and resolution_date.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: ncr_id, ncr_type, reference_type, reference_id, product_id, issue_date, reported_by, severity, root_cause, status, resolution_date

entities_post_resolution.name: Source Document Type
entities_post_resolution.definition: Source_document_id is the unique identifier of the source document linked to a financial entry, used to trace back to the originating document.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: entry_id, entry_date, period_id, source_document_type, source_document_id, created_by, approved_by, status, total_debit, total_credit

entities_post_resolution.name: Total Credit
entities_post_resolution.definition: The total amount of credit entries recorded for a financial entry or transaction in double-entry accounting.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Attributes**: entry_id, entry_date, period_id, source_document_type, source_document_id, created_by, approved_by, status, total_debit, total_credit

entities_post_resolution.name: Audit Log
entities_post_resolution.definition: Definition: A chronological record of system events including logins, data changes, approvals, and errors. Audit logs support security monitoring and compliance requirements.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A chronological record of system events including logins, data changes, approvals, and errors. Audit logs support security monitoring and compliance requirements.

entities_post_resolution.definition: Types: Balance Sheet (assets, liabilities, equity), Income Statement (revenue, expenses, profit), Cash Flow Statement (operating, investing, financing activities) | Types: Balance Sheet (assets, liabilities, equity), Income Statement (revenue, expenses, profit), Cash Flow Statement (operating, investing, financing activities)

### Bin Location
**Definition**: A specific storage location within a warehouse. Bin locations are organized into zones, aisles, shelves, and positions for efficient picking and put-away. | **Attributes**: bin_id, warehouse_id, zone_id, aisle, shelf, position, capacity_quantity, current_quantity, product_id | **Attributes**: bin_id, warehouse_id, zone_id, aisle, shelf, position, capacity_quantity, current_quantity, product_id

Budgets are compared to actual results for variance analysis. | **Attributes**: budget_id, budget_type, period_id, department_id, account_id, budgeted_amount, actual_amount, variance, status | **Attributes**: budget_id, budget_type, period_id, department_id, account_id, budgeted_amount, actual_amount, variance, status

entities_post_resolution.name: Definition
entities_post_resolution.definition:
### Quality Inspection
**Definition**: A systematic examination of materials or products to verify conformance to specifications. Inspections can be incoming (from suppliers), in-process (during production), or final (before shipping). | ### Quality Standard
**Definition**: A documented specification defining acceptance criteria for products or processes. Standards can be internal (company-specific) or external (ISO, ASTM, FDA). | ### Non-Conformance Report
**Definition**: A document describing a quality deviation or defect that does not meet specifications. NCRs trigger root cause analysis and corrective/preventive actions (CAPA).

entities_post_resolution.name: Journal Entry
entities_post_resolution.definition:
### Journal Entry
**Definition**: A recording of a financial transaction in double-entry bookkeeping. entities_post_resolution.name: Financial Plan
entities_post_resolution.definition:
### Budget
**Definition**: A financial plan that allocates resources to departments, projects, or accounts for a specific period. Budgets are compared to actual results for variance analysis.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
### Budget
**Definition**: A financial plan that allocates resources to departments, projects, or accounts for a specific period. Budgets are compared to actual results for variance analysis.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Type
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about different customer classifications, including the type name, description, whether a credit check is required, and the default payment terms applicable to that customer type.

tables_enriched.name: Customer
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about customers, including identifiers, contact and tax information, account status, credit terms and scores, financial metrics, and metadata about record creation and updates.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Address
tables_enriched.description: Stores the physical or mailing addresses associated with customers, including address type, detailed address lines, city, state, postal code, country, and a flag indicating if it is the default addres... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Customer Contact
tables_enriched.description: Stores contact information for customers, including contact names, roles, contact details, and whether the contact is the primary point of contact.

tables_enriched.name: Product Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about product categories, including their hierarchy, codes, names, and descriptions, along with the timestamp when the category record was created.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores product catalog information, including identifiers, pricing, weight and dimensions, storage requirements, status, and audit timestamps for each product.

tables_enriched.name: PRICE_LIST
tables_enriched.description: Stores the set of price lists used to determine product pricing, including their identifier, name, currency, validity period, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Product Price
tables_enriched.description: Stores pricing information for products, including price list associations, quantity-based minimums, discounts, and the date from which the price is effective.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order
tables_enriched.description: Stores the core data for customer sales orders, including identifiers, dates, involved parties (customer and sales rep), logistical details (warehouse, shipping method), financial amounts (subtotal, t... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores line-level details for customer sales orders, including quantities, pricing, discounts, taxes, line totals, and shipment dates for each product within an order.

tables_enriched.name: Invoice
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about customer invoices, including identifiers, related customer and order references, dates, currency, amounts (subtotal, tax, total, payments), and status for billing and payment ... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Invoice Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores the details of each line item on an invoice, including the product referenced, quantity, pricing, tax, and the total for the line.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for invoices, including the payment amount, method, currency, and status, linked to customers and invoices.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about suppliers including identification, contact, financial terms, ratings, delivery performance, and contact details used for supplier management and procurement.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier Address
tables_enriched.description: Stores the various addresses associated with suppliers, including the type and location details, and marks the primary address when applicable.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier Contact
tables_enriched.description: Stores contact details for suppliers, including primary contact indicators, contact roles, and contact information such as email and phone.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier Contract
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about contracts with suppliers, including contract terms, dates, renewal behavior, payment terms, currency, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Order
tables_enriched.description: Stores business data about purchase orders, including identifiers, supplier and buyer details, key dates, financial amounts, currency, status, and audit information.

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Order Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores the line items for purchase orders, including quantities, pricing, discounts, taxes, and delivery promises for each product in a given purchase order.

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Receipt
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of incoming goods receipts against purchase orders, including supplier, warehouse, carrier details, and tracking information for inventory receipt tracking.

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Receipt Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores line-item details for each received purchase order, including quantities, costs, lot information, location, and inspection requirements.

tables_enriched.name: Warehouse
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about warehouse facilities, including identifiers, location details, capacity, management, and status information for operational inventory storage.

tables_enriched.name: Warehouse Zone
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about individual zones within a warehouse, including identifiers, zone codes and names, the zone type, and whether the zone is temperature controlled.

tables_enriched.name: Bin Location
tables_enriched.description: Stores the location and capacity details for storage bins within warehouses, including identifiers, physical placement, type, capacity limits, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Inventory On Hand
tables_enriched.description: Stores current inventory levels and related attributes for each product in each warehouse location, including quantities on hand, allocated, and available, along with cost and key dates.

tables_enriched.name: Inventory Transaction
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of inventory movements, linking each transaction to a product, location, and reference context, including quantities, costs, and metadata about creation.

tables_enriched.name: Stock Transfer
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of stock transfers between warehouses, including transfer details, timing, shipping method, and tracking status.

tables_enriched.name: Stock Transfer Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores details of individual line items for stock transfers between bins, including requested, shipped, and received quantities, associated transfer and product, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Production Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about production lines, including identifiers, location, capacity, setup time, status, and when each line record was created.

tables_enriched.name: Bill of Materials
tables_enriched.description: Stores the relationship and material requirements for converting parent products into component products, including quantities, units, scrap rates, validity dates, and component classification.

tables_enriched.name: Work Order
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about work orders including identifiers, the products and production line involved, inventory warehouse location, quantities at various stages, key dates, status, priority, and audi... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: WORK_ORDER_MATERIAL
tables_enriched.description: Stores the materials required for work orders, including quantities requested and issued, unit costs, storage bin location, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Production Schedule
tables_enriched.description: Stores scheduling information for production work orders, including planned and actual start/end times, status, and priority for each production line.

tables_enriched.name: Quality Standard
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about quality standards, including identifiers, codes, names, types, versioning, issuance date, current status, and descriptive details.

tables_enriched.name: QUALITY_INSPECTION
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of quality inspections for products, including inspection details, results, defects, sample and batch sizes, standards referenced, and metadata about the inspection creation.

tables_enriched.name: Non Conformance Report
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of non-conformance events identified in products or processes, including the type, severity, root cause, and actions taken to correct and prevent recurrence, along with status and resol... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Account Type
tables_enriched.description: Stores metadata about different account types, including their identifiers, codes, descriptive names, and how balances are tracked for each type.

tables_enriched.name: General Ledger Account
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about ledger accounts used in the general ledger, including account identifiers, names, type, hierarchy, currency, descriptive text, status, and creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Accounting Period
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about accounting periods, including identifiers, codes, date ranges, fiscal year, and whether the period is closed along with the timestamp when it was closed.

tables_enriched.name: Journal Entry
tables_enriched.description: Stores journal entry records describing financial impact by debit and credit, including metadata about creation, approval, and source documents.

tables_enriched.name: Journal Entry Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores individual line items for journal entries, including debit and credit amounts by account, with optional references to related documents and cost centers.

tables_enriched.name: Accounts Receivable
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about outstanding invoices and amounts owed by customers, including related invoice, customer, and collection activity data to support accounts receivable management.

tables_enriched.name: Accounts Payable
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about amounts and timing related to payables to suppliers, including original and due amounts, invoice details, discounts, payment terms, and status of payments.

tables_enriched.name: Budget
tables_enriched.description: Store budgets and their financial values by department and account, including planned (budgeted) versus actual amounts, currency, status, and version information.

tables_enriched.name: Department
tables_enriched.description: Stores organizational units within the company, including hierarchical relationships, management, budget identifiers, location, and governance status.

tables_enriched.name: Position
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about job positions, including identifiers, titles, hierarchy, salary ranges, department association, and status metadata for human resources management.

tables_enriched.name: Employee
tables_enriched.description: Stores core information about employees including identity, role, hierarchical relationships, employment dates, compensation, contact details, location, and record creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Time Entry
tables_enriched.description: Stores time-entry records capturing employee hours spent on projects, including work date, type, description, and the approval workflow with submission and approval details.

tables_enriched.name: Carrier
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about logistics carriers, including identifiers, contact details, service levels, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Shipping Route
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about shipping routes, including how far they are, service levels, costs, and identifiers for origin, destination, and carrier.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about shipments, including identifiers, origins and destinations, timing (ship date, estimated and actual arrival), carrier and route details, tracking, costs, weight, status, and creation... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Shipment Line
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual product lines for shipments, including product and quantity details, to describe items contained in each shipment.

tables_enriched.name: Project
tables_enriched.description: Stores project information including identifiers, timeline, financials, ownership, status, and descriptive details for ongoing and completed projects.

tables_enriched.name: Project Task
tables_enriched.description: Stores tasks associated with projects, including task details, scheduling, progress, and ownership information.

tables_enriched.name: App User
tables_enriched.description: Stores user accounts and authentication-related metadata, including associations to employee, customer, and supplier records, along with login activity and audit timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Role
tables_enriched.description: Stores metadata about user roles, including identifiers, codes, names, types, descriptions, status, and the timestamp when each role was created.

tables_enriched.name: User Role
tables_enriched.description: Stores the associations between users and roles, including when a role was assigned, who assigned it, and when it expires, along with the current status.

tables_enriched.name: Audit Log
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of audit events tracking changes to entities, including who made the change, what was changed, and when, along with contextual details like the system IP and user agent.
